title: bot: payment amount_zatoshi parsing silently truncates non-numeric input
description: In dispatcher.rs line 58, amount.trim().parse().unwrap_or(0) silently converts any non-numeric string to 0. A PaymentRequest with amount="0.1 ZEC" is interpreted as 0 zatoshi. Per CLAUDE.md section 2, missing error paths that silently swallow failures are bugs. Correct behavior: reject non-parseable amounts with a debug log and return None or emit an error event.
